[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Krendan''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Krendan was on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Taul/Legends|Taul]] when the [[Rebel outpost (Taul)|Rebel outpost]] was [[Battle of Taul|attacked]] by the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Dominator (Victory-class)|''Dominator'']]. Krendan commanded [[Nomad squad]] during the battle.<ref name="UG" />

Armed with a [[Hunting blaster/Legends|hunting blaster]] and two [[Concussion grenade/Legends|concussion grenades]], Krendan was also a skilled [[Unarmed combat/Legends|hand to hand combatant]] and trained in demolitions and survival.<ref name="UG" />
